control: Show provenance, unknown, coverage and disclosure lag
trigger: UI/claim uses true hidden current without evidence

control: Separate report period, filed, observed and amount kind
trigger: UI drops period or calls snapshot flow

control: Separate structure, dependency and influence layers
trigger: Business partner shown as parent/controller

control: Hard budgets, lazy expand, grouping and truncation explanation
trigger: nodes/edges exceed limits or browser freezes

control: Evidence thresholds, derived labels, coverage and review
trigger: low-source edge published as reported

control: Typed entities and resolution tests
trigger: contract or ownership attached to brand only

control: amount_kind buckets and unit tests
trigger: commitment/ceiling/outlay combined

control: Observed date, reverify queue and no current hardcode
trigger: freshness threshold exceeded

control: Raw/quality/adjusted/coverage and language guardrails
trigger: UI says probability or guaranteed outcome

control: Frozen default, preview, counter-evidence, audit and reset
trigger: custom profile hides contradictory evidence

control: No price optimization, 14-day cadence, proposal review, rollback
trigger: proposal auto-activates or uses short-term price target

control: Transactional runs and last-known-good profile
trigger: failed run becomes active

control: Structured diff allowlist and secret scan
trigger: credential or full auth header in log

control: Append-only DB policy and no public update/delete API
trigger: historical log changed

control: Source registry, allowlist, no bypass and manual stop condition
trigger: scrape requires login bypass or forbidden use

control: Transactional batch, run IDs, idempotency and rollback
trigger: mixed run IDs or partial counts

control: Versioned multi-label classification and cross-industry navigation
trigger: entity forced into one industry only

control: Versioned exploration schema and E2E back/forward tests
trigger: reroot loses filters/profile/time

control: Gate/file scope and Git baseline
trigger: changes outside current Gate

control: Sandbox, network-off, approvals and secret scan
trigger: unsafe mode or secret diff

control: Recorded environment and separate API/render metrics
trigger: numbers reported without hardware/data size

control: Conflict/supersession records and evidence drawer
trigger: older fact disappears without history

control: Configurable sizing, text explanation and table alternative
trigger: node size defaults to degree without label

control: Upgrade/downgrade test and backup runbook
trigger: migration lacks downgrade

control: Directional grammar labels evidence inspector and task testing
trigger: Users cannot explain upstream/downstream after 30 seconds

control: Budgets grouping semantic zoom progressive expand and list alternative
trigger: First screen exceeds 40 edges or labels overlap

control: Canvas empty-state industry overlay and demo
trigger: Empty account shows blank workspace

control: Responsive drawer states and visual regression
trigger: Canvas falls below 60 percent or controls overlap

control: Stable directional grammar retained positions breadcrumb and transition
trigger: Users lose prior context after pivot

control: Plain labels plus expandable machine type source and time
trigger: User cannot distinguish fact inference and conflict

control: Shape line style icons labels table and contrast tests
trigger: Relation meaning disappears in grayscale

control: Versioned state schema migration and safe fallback
trigger: Reload produces blank/error canvas

control: Lexicon forbidden-term lint and copy review
trigger: reroot/hop/profile/gate visible in UI

control: Demo watermark fixtures evidence boundary and implementation gates
trigger: Prototype screenshot presented as live verified data

control: 单一机器可读目录+CI引用完整性检查+PR模板强制更新
trigger: catalog validation fails or docs counts differ

control: 不可变配置版本+原子active snapshot+SSE版本号+失败回滚
trigger: two visible components report different model/snapshot versions

control: manifest/checksum/release checklist/catalog integrity workflow
trigger: release artifact cannot reproduce documented version

control: 定义、方向、排除项、证据门槛和人工复核队列
trigger: same fact maps to conflicting families without review

control: 以机器目录为源；PR 同步清单；CI 交叉校验
trigger: 目录或公式变更但追踪矩阵未更新

control: 事实/推断分离；有效期；多源核验；冲突状态
trigger: 关键控制关系只有单一二手来源

control: 阶段模型；证据门槛；图预算；按需展开
trigger: 默认视图超过预算或推断关系无双源

control: 证据状态、coverage、unknown 和冲突视觉编码
trigger: 未知金额被画成 0 或边宽

control: amount_kind；币种/期间；同语义才聚合
trigger: Sankey 混合承诺上限与实际支付

control: 司法辖区、有效期和来源分层
trigger: 跨国政策被当作全局统一适用

control: 语言护栏；反证；置信度；研究假设标签
trigger: UI 出现收益概率或买卖指令

control: 版本化 taxonomy；多标签；迁移映射
trigger: 同一对象跨版本分类不可复现

control: 原子快照；响应携带版本；前端一致性检查
trigger: 同屏出现不同 score_snapshot_id

control: 原型/fixture 标签；生产连接状态；真实行数来源
trigger: 未接数据库时显示无来源的大规模数字

control: 范围、权重和图预算门槛；dry-run；影响预览
trigger: 参数越界或可见边数超过 240

control: 单事务版本+日志+outbox；失败不切换
trigger: 配置已生效但无 operation_log

control: 只生成 proposal；人工接受；可回滚
trigger: 校准任务直接激活配置

control: CODEOWNERS；PR 模板；CI；状态页
trigger: 连续两次发布未更新治理目录

control: motion token；reduced motion；性能预算；渐进渲染
trigger: P75 首次交互 >2.5s 或 motion 偏好无效
